name: incr-caller-chain
code: (begin (set-code "(define (f x) (+ x 1))(define (g x) (f x))(define (h x) (g x))")(typecheck-current)(mutate:rebind "f" "(lambda (x) (* x 2))" "op")(typecheck-current)(display (eval-current))(display (h 5)))

name: incr-caller-dirty
code: (begin (set-code "(define (add x y) (+ x y))(define (caller z) (add z 1))(define (other z) (* z 2))")(typecheck-current)(mutate:rebind "add" "(lambda (a b) (* a b))" "mul")(typecheck-current)(display (eval-current))(display (caller 5))(display (other 5)))

name: incr-large-typecheck
code: (begin (set-code "(define (fib n) (if (< n 2) n (+ (fib (- n 1)) (fib (- n 2)))))(define (fact n) (if (= n 0) 1 (* n (fact (- n 1))))) (define (map f l) (if (null? l) (quote ()) (cons (f (car l)) (map f (cdr l)))))(define (sum l) (if (null? l) 0 (+ (car l) (sum (cdr l)))))")(typecheck-current)(typecheck-current)(typecheck-current)(display "ok"))

name: incr-multi-mutate
code: (begin (set-code "(define (f x) (+ x 1))(define (g x) (f x))")(typecheck-current)(mutate:rebind "f" "(lambda (x) (* x 2))" "op")(typecheck-current)(mutate:rebind "g" "(lambda (x) (f x))" "chain")(typecheck-current)(display "ok"))

name: incr-mutate
code: (begin (set-code "(define (add x y) (+ x y))")(typecheck-current)(mutate:rebind "add" "(lambda (a b) (* a b))" "test")(typecheck-current)(display "ok"))

name: incr-workspace-switch
code: (begin (set-code "(define (f x) (+ x 1))")(typecheck-current)(define sandbox (workspace:create "sandbox"))(workspace:switch sandbox)(set-code "(define (f x) (* x 2))")(typecheck-current)(workspace:switch 0)(typecheck-current)(display "ok"))
